title: Ok am I the only one
display_title: Ok am I the only one
wikitext:
[]: Ok, am I the only one... Post by Aether » Sun Mar 29, 2015 7:33 pm ...who sees the CLONE SITTING IN THE ALIEN!?!? ... SQUAWK(You're crazy) But what about her HORRIBLE BLUE HAIR!? It's a skin condition. And you've got no ears! Is that part of your skin condition too? No ears? ...yes [/img] This had to be done eventually. I take full responsibility for the devastation I've caused.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 29, 2015 7:41 pm Make sure none of your images are hot-linked, then try again.

[]: Post by Aether » Sun Mar 29, 2015 8:06 pm Is that better?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 29, 2015 9:35 pm Well, the pictures all appear now, but I have no idea what it's supposed to mean.
